title: Dogfood epic/lane/slice preservation and closeout
lane_outcome: The final PR closeout reports whether AW preserved #1354 intent across epic, lane, and slice levels, names remaining parent gaps, and routes any dogfooding findings to concrete issues or fixes.
purpose_for_parent: Prevents narrow slice completion from being misreported as full parent intent satisfaction.
technical_strategy: Aggregate lane evidence from #1356, #1357, #1358, and command-generation support into the PR closeout. Close parent #1354 only if every acceptance target has proof or a non-blocking limitation with owner.

slice_sequence.title: Write parent closure and dogfooding matrix
slice_sequence.purpose_for_lane: Make #1354 closure evidence explicit across epic/lane/slice work and dogfooding findings.
slice_sequence.proof: PR body maps each issue/lane to proof, names command-generation PR #6, and records dogfooding issues #1361/#1362.
slice_sequence.residual_after_slice: None if parent #1354 closure is honestly supportable.

acceptance_boundary: All lane slices have landed, lane proof aggregation is satisfied, and residual work is routed.
proof_strategy: Closeout report maps each #1354 dogfooding requirement to observed evidence, fixed/routed findings, and remaining limitations.

evidence: Parent closeout evidence recorded in archived execplan generated-cli-boundary-dogfooding-closeout: #1356 runtime-source edit gate, #1357 runtime inventory minimization, #1358 generated target parity/freshness, command-generation PR #6 support and AW pin, selected AW proof, and dogfooding issues #1361/#1362.
known_gaps: No remaining lane work. Merge ordering limitation: command-generation PR #6 must land before the AW dependency pin can merge safely.

residual_lane_work: No remaining lane work. Merge ordering limitation: command-generation PR #6 must land before the AW dependency pin can merge safely.
lane_to_epic_contribution: This lane aggregates the #1354 epic evidence across decomposition lanes, explicit child issue proof, command-generation support, and dogfooding findings so parent closure can be reviewed honestly.

closeout_state.summary: This lane aggregates the #1354 epic evidence across decomposition lanes, explicit child issue proof, command-generation support, and dogfooding findings so parent closure can be reviewed honestly.
closeout_state.residual_work: No remaining lane work. Merge ordering limitation: command-generation PR #6 must land before the AW dependency pin can merge safely.
closeout_state.next_owner: PR reviewer; command-generation PR #6 merge ordering
